source_records.claim_scope: Reports the R33 forward, reverse and reaction benchmark energies; no method is adopted as a new protocol.
Open reassessment and lawful source of the version-matched supplementary coordinate archive.
unresolved: container hash alone accepts no scientific field

source_records.claim_scope: Reports three 15-atom Cartesian blocks with Pt1 C1 N2 H11; the text does not report charge or multiplicity.

Identifies the Pt methyl-hydride H/D-scrambling chemistry and separately reports the [(NH3)3PtMe(H)2]+ rigidity-test model; the 15-atom N2 MOBH35 reoptimized reduced coordination state is not asserted to be that N3 model.
unresolved: exact mapping to the reoptimized R33 reduced coordination state

criteria.requirement: Lawfully accessible start, TS and end Cartesian coordinates with stable hashes.
One metal center and a reviewed small atom inventory suitable for a bounded smoke.
A contiguous one-based atom map binds start, TS and end without element-order drift.
Reviewer-supplied charge, multiplicity, oxidation and ligand-charge convention close electron accounting.
Candidate-specific wavefunction, stability and multireference evidence supports a single-reference treatment.
Credible multiplicities and crossing relevance are reviewed with no unresolved spin crossing or MECP requirement.
Complete coordination contacts, ligand inventory, hapticity and distance windows are reviewed with no complex hapticity.
The intended forming, breaking or transferring atoms and endpoint identities are source-located and reviewed.
Candidate-bound M0, blocked M2a, real M1 review source and M1 sidecar have exact hashes.
Metal M2 runtime and M3 execution contracts pass before a separately approved exact M4 action.

exclusions: Wang 2025 borane/nickel is retained as the final asymmetric target and is too complex for the first metal smoke.
The open Pd-hydride TS(S)/TS(R) case has public coordinates but roughly 90-plus atoms per TS and is not minimal.
MOBH35 benchmark methods and energies are evidence for R33 only and are not a protocol default.

blockers.reason: The open R33 coordinate text contains no charge record.
blockers.required_evidence: Candidate-specific primary or dataset source plus reviewer decision.

blockers.reason: The open R33 coordinate text contains no multiplicity record.
blockers.required_evidence: Candidate-specific source locator and reviewed multiplicity inventory.

blockers.reason: Oxidation state, ligand-charge convention, d count and parity are not candidate-bound.
blockers.required_evidence: Reviewer-supplied electron-accounting record with evidence locators.

blockers.reason: Dataset-level closed-shell labeling is not candidate-level single-reference acceptance.
blockers.required_evidence: Wavefunction, stability, occupation, alternative-solution and multireference review.

blockers.reason: Element order is observed but chemical atom roles and cross-structure correspondence are unreviewed.
blockers.required_evidence: One-based reviewed atom map for all three structures.

blockers.reason: Pt coordination contacts, ligand identities and distance windows are not inventoried.
blockers.required_evidence: Candidate-bound coordination inventory and reviewer-supplied windows.

blockers.reason: The actual H-scrambling forming and breaking pairs are not yet source-located and mapped.
blockers.required_evidence: Reviewed elementary-step class, intended coordinate and endpoint identities.

blockers.reason: The coordinate archive alone does not provide a candidate-bound raw imaginary mode or displacement review.
blockers.required_evidence: Source-located frequency/mode evidence or a later separately approved local result review.

blockers.reason: No new-system three-tier protocol has been proposed or selected.
blockers.required_evidence: Metal-specific method review followed by independent protocol options and selection.

blockers.reason: The repository metal runtime and M3 execution boundary remain unsupported.
blockers.required_evidence: Implemented and adversarially tested M2 and M3 contracts before any M4 proposal.

blockers.reason: Wang 2025 lacks repository-bound exact coordinates, atom maps and coordination inventory.
blockers.required_evidence: Lawfully reviewed SI transcription and candidate hashes for both stereochemical channels.
